title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #3, Black Maria, Unknown person #4 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Second Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's wrong with you guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is this conqueror's Haki?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They can't help it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's natural for men with weak resolve...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...To Crumble before me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, I took down two of the flying six!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They call me usohachi, the beast hunter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whaa-!! two of them?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Surrender now and I'll permit you to join our cause!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This must be happening because big mom is fighting on this floor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're being knocked out by mere echoes of her conqueror's haki!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! Do you know what's going on with Luffy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Franky ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Right- brain tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No idea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Last update I got was what momo- Nosuke said earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I bet Momo's with Shinobu- Chan,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I can't get a hold of her either!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No news is probably good news!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How can you say that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're done upstairs, meet me down here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm not sure what's going on,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But a bunch of enemies keep trying to storm the live floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Run!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't let them through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zoro and Sanji are busy takin' on the all-stars!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: We're in an equal alliance, Hi-Yah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can't start giving us orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Third Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This looks bad!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The flames are out of control!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We gotta escape to the live floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aaaa A!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It actually feels like I'm burning!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess this technically means I've been cremated!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No, wait, this doesn't count!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: BARON CORPSE!! ARE YOU ALL RIGHT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We can't stay here anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: I won't let Robin- San Get Burned!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How is the Battle Going?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No clue, it's total chaos out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kid Pirates - Fourth Floor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: JINBE-SAN! JINBE-SAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The third floor is erupting into a sea of flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please come while there's still time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Has the fire gotten that bad?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And where's Kaido?! is some- one else keeping him busy?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy is pouring out of the castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let us through, Samuel scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We own the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And the live floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Stand your ground!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 53 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
